refined_caption: The hospital bathroom is dirty with toilet paper scattered all over the floor. The area appears to be unhygienic.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy with toilet paper all over the floor. This is unacceptable for a place where patients are supposed to receive care. The hospital needs to improve its sanitation standards.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, there's toilet paper all over the floor. It's really unhygienic.
